response.justification: Exceptional full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, MIT education, and deep expertise across web, mobile, and embedded systems. Currently employed at re:cinq as Staff Engineer working with TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure—perfectly aligned with the role's current priorities. Primary gaps are React (despite being primary stack) and explicit Vitest/modern testing framework experience, though the underlying engineering quality and rapid learning demonstrated across diverse languages suggest these are easily acquired.
strengths: Currently at re:cinq as Staff Engineer with direct TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure expertise matching core responsibilities
13+ years full-stack development with proven depth in backend architecture, cloud platforms (AWS CDK), containerization, and database optimization across multiple paradigms
MIT graduate demonstrating exceptional problem-solving, architectural thinking, and mentorship (workshops, talks, open-source libraries) across diverse technical domains
concerns: No React experience listed; primary stack requires React but resume emphasizes Ember.js and other frameworks instead
Testing framework expertise not explicitly detailed; no mention of Jest/Vitest/Playwright despite strong engineering background and focus on testability
Nest.js framework not mentioned; while Node.js experience is substantial, framework-specific knowledge and opinions are unclear

key_factors.factor: Current role at re:cinq with TypeScript/Node.js and AI agents
React and modern testing framework (Vitest/Playwright) gaps
13+ years full-stack with MIT education and architectural depth
